PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Wright for petitioner Timothy Ramier.

The Court stated that the only impediment to distribution apparent at this time was that estate assets were being held by the State of Massachusetts, and inquired as to progress in getting them released. Mr. Wright stated that progress was being made, that the only assets now being held by Massachusetts were securities which he was moving forward to getting cashed out, and that he expected to be in position to file a petition for final distribution in August.
The Court inquired regarding the preliminary distribution having been made to beneficiaries Mr. & Mrs. Ewe Klaus von Schotten, without a parallel distribution to beneficiary Marie Madeleine Nicolaon. Mr. Wright responded that the distribution had been made back in 2010, and he was uncertain as to why, but that as he intended to file his petition for final distribution in the near future, it did not make sense to make another preliminary distribution at this time.
The hearing on status of the accounting was continued to August 18, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Continued To Apr-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Excutor and the Attorney to appear on April 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Wright, Jr. for Timothy Ramier (Petitioner).

Mr. Wright explained why they felt it was appropriate to set up another organization, stated that they submitted an application to the State of Massachusetts to have escheated funds from the investments returned and that they should have the issue of the escheated funds cleared up at the latest by March 1, 2015. The Court granted the petition for approval of report of status of administration (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was set for March 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
